content.en:
The ancestor of the Qin family that Qin Yu wants to see is naturally the ancestor of his lineage, a transcendent realm legendary realm lord, the legendary realm lord in the immeasurable sea is too mysterious, and the half-step legendary realm lords are all in retreat to impact the legendary realm and the number is scarce, in fact, the transcendent realm legendary lord is the overlord of the immeasurable sea, which is enough to deter the Quartet.

Qin Yu's ancestor is named Qin Wuyuan, and he is not weak among the legendary lords of the transcendent realm, and he has a certain reputation in the Infinite Sea.

"The descendants of Qin Yu ask to see the ancestor!"

Qin Yu stood outside the main hall and shouted.

"Come in!"

Qin Wuyuan said.

Wow!

The door of the main hall opened, and Qin Yu walked in.

Soon, he met Qin Wuyuan.

Qin Wuyuan, who was dressed in a black robe, sat on the throne, quietly looked at Qin Yu, and asked, "Qin Yuan, did you come to see me to cause trouble with "One Zero Seven"?"

Qin Yu immediately said, "Ancestor, I lost the Fire Domain Sword!"

Rumble!!!

The breath of detachment suppressed down, making Qin Yu tremble.

Between the Initial Realm and the Transcendental Realm there is a Perfection Realm and a Realm Realm, and the difference in strength between the two is too great.

Therefore, Qin Yu couldn't resist the breath of the ancestor at all, and of course he didn't dare to resist.

"The Fire Domain Sword is the eternal treasure of our Qin family, although our Qin family is very ancient, but there are only less than twenty eternal treasures, you can obtain an eternal treasure in the initial realm, it is the Qin family who values you, but you lost an eternal treasure, do you know how much loss this is to the Qin family???"

Qin Wuyuan was extremely angry.

If it weren't for Qin Yu, who was the genius of the Qin family, and he had high hopes, otherwise he would really want to slap Qin Yu to death.

Qin Yu hurriedly said: "Ancestor, although I lost the Fire Domain Sword, I found a very weak Eternal Sea, this Eternal Sea only has a few Legendary Realm Lords, and the most powerful Legendary Lord is the Origin Realm Legendary Lord, but the other party's strength is much stronger than mine, and he has the Eternal Treasure. "

"The new Eternal Sea, tell me its approximate location, and I'll check it, in case it's the territory of some powerful force, we can't gnaw on it. Qin Wuyuan said.

"Yes, Ancestor!"

Qin Yu immediately reported the location of Yuan Hai.

Qin Wuyuan immediately began to investigate, and soon after, he found that the Infinite Sea really did not have any record of the Source Sea.

A Henghai, how high is its value, the Qin family will even rise completely because of this, and become a legendary family.

Compared to an eternal sea, the fire domain sword is indeed not worth mentioning.

It's a pity that Qin Yu didn't enter the Source Sea, he went directly to the lord headquarters of the Shizuo Territory, so he didn't go to the Source Sea in time to calculate the space-time coordinates of the Source Sea in the Void Sky Region, otherwise, the Qin family could now directly construct the space-time ladder to go to the Source Sea.

Qin Yu didn't know that this kind of thing would happen.otherwise, he would definitely enter the Source Sea as soon as possible and calculate the space-time coordinates of the Source Sea.

In order to let the Qin family control the Source Sea as soon as possible, Qin Wuyuan sent three top Realm Legendary Lords, plus six Perfection Realm Legendary Lords and many Origin Realm Legendary Lords, to the Source Sea together.

Led by three Realm Legendary Lords, the speed will be fast.

As for the Transcendental Legendary Lord, it is not suitable to be dispatched, after all, the Qin family is not without enemies, if the Transcendental Realm Legendary Lord is dispatched, it will inevitably cause shocks, in case the location of the source sea is leaked, then there will be other forces competing with the Qin family.

......

Source Sea.

Time and space continued to fluctuate, and layers of time and space appeared around the Mixed Yuan Order, and then in Ye Tian's time and space ladder secret technique, it gradually turned into layers of ladders, extending to the depths of time and space like stone steps.

At first, the steps were illusory, but they quickly solidified like real stone steps.

These stone steps are completely condensed by the power of time and space, and contain the origin power of the source sea, so they are very stable, even ordinary legendary lords are difficult to destroy such a time and space ladder, if the time and space ladder is connected to the Infinite Sea and is reinforced by the origin of the Infinite Sea, then it is difficult for even Ye Tian himself to destroy such a time and space ladder, unless it takes a long time to destroy it.

In addition, the space-time ladder is one-way, which is also for safety, if it is a two-way space-time ladder, who would dare to build a space-time ladder indiscriminately?

The time and space ladder can only go up, not 0........

If you enter the Infinite Sea from the Source Sea and still want to come back, you can only build the space-time ladder from the Infinite Sea and come back.

Time passed slowly, and after a long time, the time and space ladder was finally completed.

Airplanes!!!!

A wave came, and the space-time ladder connected the Infinite Sea, with the reinforcement of the origin of the Infinite Sea, the space-time ladder became extremely stable and solid.

"It's done!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

However, in order to build the Space-Time Ladder, the Hybrid Order consumes a lot of money, and it takes a long time to repair it to be intact, which may be the only price to pay for building the Space-Time Ladder.

"It's time to enter the Immeasurable Sea, and find the True Nothing Holy Land as quickly as possible, and then join the True No Holy Land. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, Ye Tian stepped into the space-time ladder step by step, bearing the pressure from endless space-time, fortunately, his strength was strong enough, so he was enough to complete the space-time ladder, if it was those immortal realm lords, they really couldn't pass the space-time ladder.

Ye Tian's speed was not slow, he stepped through the layers of space-time ladders, and after a long time, he really came to the end of the space-time ladder.

This is a gate of time and space, Ye Tian pushed open the door of time and space, and entered the Infinite Sea.

0.9㐈...

The immeasurable sea, a sea area.

The sea water here is actually the same as the source sea, and it is all made up of endless source energy.

The surroundings were empty, and Ye Tian had just entered here, and he didn't know where this was.

Subsequently.

He kept flying, and after flying for a long time, he saw an island with a vast expanse of sea.

"This must be an infinite island!

Ye Tian guessed.

The status of the Infinite Island is like the territory of time and space beyond the Source Sea, and any Infinite Island is a prosperous place

Although Ye Tian didn't know the situation of this immeasurable island, he was about to enter here soon, at least he needed to know where he was now, and then inquire about the location of the True Saintless Land, so that he could go to the True Void Holy Land.

Wow!

Ye Tian entered this immeasurable island from the immeasurable sea. _

16. To see the ununderlined version of the novel, please download the Flying Novel APP!
